registration.description: Voter registration is the process of signing up to vote in elections.
methods: In-person at DMV or election office
registration.how_to_check: Visit your state's election website or use national voter registration portal

important_dates_2024.description: Last day to request absentee ballot

voting_methods.in_person_early: Vote at designated early voting locations before Election Day
voting_methods.in_person_election_day: Vote at your assigned polling place on Election Day
voting_methods.vote_by_mail: Receive ballot by mail and return via postal service or drop box
voting_methods.absentee_ballot: For voters who cannot vote in person on Election Day

required_documents.most_states: Non-photo ID like utility bill or bank statement (varies by state)
required_documents.some_states: Government-issued photo ID (driver's license, passport, state ID)
required_documents.first_time_voters: May need additional proof of residency

polling_place_info.where_to_find: Check your voter registration card, state election website, or local election office
polling_place_info.wait_times: Early morning and evening tend to be busiest
